description.value: Aura moderate varies; Slot none; CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs.; Price 51,688 gp DESCRIPTION Just over 7 feet tall and topped with what looks like a large iron skeleton key, this unassuming oaken staff appears to be nothing but a common walking stick. It allows use of the following spells: Detect secret doors (2 charges) Knock (2 charges) Passwall (3 charges) Freedom (5 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells detect secret doors, freedom, knock, passwall; Cost 25,840 gp
